name: Help Scout
description: A customer support platform providing shared inboxes, knowledge base, and customer management tools.

auth_methods.note: Docs state Help Scout supports OAuth 2.0; legacy API Keys are still mentioned as supported for existing apps.

credential_access.note: Developers can register apps in the Developer Dashboard and obtain client ID/secret for development; creating a test app implies self-serve credentials without human approval.

api_surface.note: API Reference states a REST API covering Conversations, Customers, Mailboxes, Users, reports and webhooks; community SDKs exist but no official SDKs.

buildability.note: Public REST docs and self-serve OAuth credentials exist, so integrations can be built today.

queries: How to register Help Scout app Developer Dashboard
Help Scout API reference conversations customers mailboxes
